positive: Symmetrical, detailed mandala style arrangement of cosmic and botanical elements. Centralized composition featuring interconnected celestial bodies (moons, nebulas, stars) interwoven with stylized, ethereal flora (swirling vines, bioluminescent flowers). Strong contrast between deep indigo, cosmic violet, sapphire blue, and glowing turquoise accents. The overall aesthetic must be clean, graphic, and suitable for screen printing or direct-to-garment textile printing. High contrast silhouettes, clean lines, intricate repeating patterns, ornamental, mystic, visionary art, symmetrical, pop-art influence.
negative: photorealistic, blurry, noise, jpeg artifacts, text, watermark, signature, logo, low resolution, bad anatomy, poorly drawn, cartoon, messy, scribble
